call

options.description: Password for OPC UA Client Channel

options.name: --opc-ua-username
options.description: UserName for OPC UA Client Channel

options.name: --optimization-method
options.description:
Sets the OptimizationMethod. Valid values are: 
WriteAllValuesForAllTags, WriteOnlyLatestValueForNonBooleanTags, 
WriteOnlyLatestValueForAllTags (default)

options.name: --password
options.description:
Password for Kepware server configuration 
endpoint

options.name: --server-message-mode
options.description:
Sets the ServerMessageMode. Valid values are: None 
(default), Sign, SignAndEncrypt

options.name: --server-security-policy
options.description:
Sets the ServerSecurityPolicy. Valid values are: None
(default), Basic128Rsa15, Basic256, Basic256Sha256

options.name: --server-url
options.description:
Server Url for Kepserver configuration 
endpoint

options.name: --session-failed-connection-retry-interval-seconds
options.description:
Specifies the rate, in seconds, at which the channel 
attempts to reconnect if it fails to connect or becomes 
disconnected

options.name: --session-renewal-interval-minutes
options.description:
Specifies the time, in minutes, between channel 
renewals

options.name: --session-timeout-inactive-minutes
options.description:
Specifies the maximum amount of time, in minutes, a 
session remains open without activity

options.name: --session-watchdog-timeout
options.description:
Specifies the rate the client reads the server status
state node

options.name: --username
options.description:
UserName for Kepware server configuration 
endpoint

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Use verbose for more debug/trace 
information

options.name: --write-optimization-duty-cycle
options.description:
Specifies the ratio of write operations to read 
operations, based on one read per configurable number of writes.

options.description:
The number of tag events the gateway packages in a

options.name: --name
options.description: Iot Agent Name

options.name: --password
options.description:
Password for Kepware server configuration 
endpoint

options.name: --publish-format
options.description:
Sets the format type for Publishing. Valid values 
are: Narrow (default), Wide

options.name: --publish-http-method
options.description:
Sets the HttpMethod for Publishing. Valid values are:
Post (default), Put

options.name: --publish-media-type
options.description:
Sets the media type for Publishing. Only valid when 
PublishMessageFormat is set to (Advanced). Valid values are: Json (default), 
Xml, XhtmlXml, TextPlain, TextHtml

options.name: --publish-message-format
options.description:
Specifies how messages should be formatted. Valid 
values are: Standard, Advanced (default)

options.name: --rate
options.description:
Specifies the frequency, in milliseconds, at which 
the agent pushes data to the endpoint

options.name: --send-initial-update
options.description:
Indicates if an initial update should be sent out on 
each tag when the Iot Agent starts up

endpoint

endpoint

commands.name: iot-item
commands.description: Commands for iot items

commands.name: mqtt-client
commands.description:
Operations related to MQTT Client Iot Agent Iot 
Items

commands.name: create

options.name: --dead-band-percent
options.description:
Specifies the DeadBand (%) when SendEveryScan is 
false (default: 0)

options.name: --enabled
options.description:
Indicates whether the Iot Item is enabled (default: 
true)

options.name: --iot-agent-name
options.description: Iot Agent Name

options.name: --password
options.description:
Password for Kepware server configuration 
endpoint

options.name: --scan-rate
options.description:
Specifies the frequency, in milliseconds, at which 
the iot item should be scanned (default: 10000)

options.name: --send-every-scan
options.description:
Specifies if the tag should be published on every 
scan or only on data changes (default: false)

options.name: --server-tag
options.description:
The server tag the Iot Item is pointing 
to

options.name: --server-url
options.description:
Server Url for Kepserver configuration 
endpoint

options.name: --username
options.description:
UserName for Kepware server configuration 
endpoint

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Use verbose for more debug/trace 
information

commands.description:

agent.

options.name: --verbose
